description_long: This bungalow features a broad, low-pitched roof with deep overhangs and exposed rafters, characteristic of Craftsman-style architecture. The exterior is finished in a warm, earthy brown with contrasting darker roof elements and visible wooden accents along the base and steps. The front facade includes a central entrance with a small set of steps leading up to it, flanked by symmetrical windows. The roof is a prominent gable type, extending the full length of the structure, with additional gable details at the ends. The windows are arranged in a balanced, symmetrical pattern, enhancing the bungalow's inviting and orderly appearance. The overall structure is single-story, with a visible porch area at the front entrance.
description: A single-story Craftsman bungalow with a wide gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a front porch with steps. The exterior features earthy brown tones and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central entrance, steps, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated gable roof and end gable detail.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar roofline and window arrangement as the front, but without the entrance steps.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 1 with visible roof and end gable.
